name: Parmesan Cheese Cones
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese, Parmesan, mayonnaise, oregano, and garlic powder in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Shape the mixture into two cone shapes using the almonds as the base and forming "petals" to resemble pine cones on a large serving board or platter.
3. Decorate the cones with evergreen sprigs and Christmas balls.
4. Serve with fruit and crackers.
